name: Suzhou Crystal Clear Chemical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Crystal Clear Chemical Co.,Ltd. produces and sells ultra-pure chemical materials and other fine chemical products for the microelectronics industry in China. The company offers various chemicals, including ammonia, isopropyl alcohol, hydrogen peroxide, ammonium hydroxide, nitric acid, sulfuric acid, hydrofluoric acid, chlorhydric acid, ammonium fluoride, BOE, IPA, ethanol, methanol, butyl acetate, acetone, acetic acid, oxalic acid, sodium hydroxide, potassium hydroxide, and others. It also provides aluminum, poly-si, chromium, and ITO etches; etching liquid gold; mixed acids; stripping commodities; KOH developing solutions; tetramethylammonium hydroxide; nano fingerprint resistant fluids; liquid crystal display chemicals; solid thermal resistance to strong acid spray waxes; cleaning fluids; and supplementary reagents. The company' products are primarily used in VLSI, LED, TFT-LCD panel manufacturing processes, solar wafer etching, and cleaning applications. Suzhou Crystal Clear Chemical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Suzhou, China.
